name: orbit-lifecycle-system
description: Lifecycle marketing, CRM, email, SMS, push, retention, deliverability, segmentation, experimentation, and martech operating system for Claude — Orbit Intelligence. Walks users through getting the right inputs, cites practitioner guides, and closes every answer with a concrete next action. Native Braze, Iterable, HubSpot, PostHog integration.
long_description: Orbit gives Claude a local lifecycle marketing operating system — Orbit Intelligence — that behaves like a senior lifecycle operator working as an extension of the user's team. It routes requests to the right Orbit protocol, walks the user through any missing data before tools fire (Guided Discovery), cites the specific practitioner guides that informed each answer as Further reading, and returns diagnoses / recommendations with the concrete next action the user needs. Exposes the full skill library as resources, bundles 80+ long-form practitioner guides on lifecycle marketing, deliverability, Braze, email craft, and experimentation as MCP resources for inline citation, loads a canonical skill manifest for routing and validation, creates and maintains a local ~/Orbit workspace automatically on first run without requiring folder setup, runs a step-by-step brand-guidelines intake before drafting brand kits with brand-profile.json plus brand-guidelines.md, runs a discovery-first workflow for journeys, programs, and campaigns so Orbit grounds the work in objectives, KPIs, audience context, connected data sources, and execution constraints before building flows, validates local setup and brand kits, imports Figma email designs and PDF references, infers reusable email components with a controlled taxonomy plus reusable props-and-slots contracts, generates component-first MJML lifecycle emails with HTML previews and QA, saves reusable templates, components, and programs into a local library, syncs Braze Content Blocks and HTML email templates via API, packages Braze-ready implementation bundles, and exports Notion-friendly documentation.

activation_key.title: Activation Key
activation_key.description: Required for integrations. Orbit is a one-off purchase — buy it at https://yourorbit.team/pricing, copy the Activation Key from your account, and paste it here. Without it, Orbit's Braze, Stripo, Figma, and image tools stay locked.

company_name.title: Company Name
company_name.description: Optional default company or brand name used in Orbit outputs.

default_platform.title: Default Platform
default_platform.description: Optional default ESP for the generic orbit_esp_* tools when no platform is passed. One of: braze, iterable, customerio, klaviyo, mailchimp, sfmc. Defaults to braze.

default_geography.title: Default Geography
default_geography.description: Optional default geography or market for compliance-aware recommendations.

google_ai_api_key.title: Google AI API Key
google_ai_api_key.description: Google AI API key for Gemini image generation. Required for brand header rendering.

figma_api_token.title: Figma API Token
figma_api_token.description: Optional token used to import structured email designs from Figma.

braze_api_key.title: Braze API Key
braze_api_key.description: Optional Braze REST API key used to publish Content Blocks and HTML email templates.

braze_rest_endpoint.title: Braze REST Endpoint
braze_rest_endpoint.description: Optional Braze REST API endpoint, for example https://rest.iad-01.braze.com.

iterable_api_key.title: Iterable API Key
iterable_api_key.description: Iterable server-side API key used to read and push templates, campaigns, and metrics. Create it in Iterable under Integrations → API Keys.

iterable_endpoint.title: Iterable API Endpoint
iterable_endpoint.description: Optional Iterable API base URL. Defaults to https://api.iterable.com; EU projects use https://api.eu.iterable.com. Find your data centre in Iterable under Settings → Project.

customerio_app_api_key.title: Customer.io App API Key
customerio_app_api_key.description: Customer.io App API Bearer key used to read campaigns, newsletters, segments, and metrics and to send transactional proofs. Create it in Customer.io under Account Settings → API Credentials → App API Keys.

customerio_region.title: Customer.io Region
customerio_region.description: Optional Customer.io data centre: us (api.customer.io) or eu (api-eu.customer.io). Defaults to us. Find your region in Customer.io under Account Settings → Workspaces.

klaviyo_api_key.title: Klaviyo API Key
klaviyo_api_key.description: Klaviyo private API key (pk_…) used to read and push templates, campaigns, flows, segments, and reports. Create it in Klaviyo under Settings → API Keys.

mailchimp_api_key.title: Mailchimp API Key
mailchimp_api_key.description: Mailchimp API key used to read and push templates, campaigns, audiences, and reports. The datacenter is parsed from the key's -usX suffix. Create it in Mailchimp under Account → Extras → API keys.

mailchimp_server_prefix.title: Mailchimp Server Prefix
mailchimp_server_prefix.description: Optional Mailchimp datacenter prefix (for example us14). Only set this if your API key has no -usX suffix. Find it in the browser address bar after logging in to Mailchimp (…admin.mailchimp.com → the usX subdomain).

sfmc_client_id.title: SFMC Client ID
sfmc_client_id.description: Salesforce Marketing Cloud OAuth2 Client Id from a server-to-server Installed Package. Find it in SFMC under Setup → Apps → Installed Packages → your package → API Integration.

sfmc_client_secret.title: SFMC Client Secret
sfmc_client_secret.description: Salesforce Marketing Cloud OAuth2 Client Secret paired with the Client Id. Find it in SFMC under Setup → Apps → Installed Packages → your package → API Integration.

sfmc_subdomain.title: SFMC Subdomain
sfmc_subdomain.description: Salesforce Marketing Cloud tenant subdomain used to build the auth and REST base URLs. Take it from the Authentication Base URI of your Installed Package (the host segment before .auth.marketingcloudapis.com).

sfmc_account_id.title: SFMC Account ID (MID)
sfmc_account_id.description: Optional Salesforce Marketing Cloud business-unit MID to scope API calls. Find it in SFMC under Setup → Account Settings, or in the account switcher. Leave blank to use the package's default business unit.

stripo_plugin_id.title: Stripo Plugin ID
stripo_plugin_id.description: Stripo Plugin ID used to mint editor JWTs. Find it in Stripo under Account → Plugin. Required to use any Stripo tool.

stripo_secret_key.title: Stripo Secret Key
stripo_secret_key.description: Stripo Plugin Secret Key paired with the Plugin ID. Required to use any Stripo tool.

stripo_rest_api_token.title: Stripo REST API Token
stripo_rest_api_token.description: Per-project REST API token from Stripo (Settings → Workspace → Projects → REST API). Required to sync saved modules and create emails. Distinct from the Plugin ID and Secret Key.

stripo_workspace_id.title: Stripo Workspace ID
stripo_workspace_id.description: Optional Stripo workspace identifier. Only set if your Stripo account requires workspace scoping for module or email API calls.

stripo_master_template_id.title: Stripo Master Template ID
stripo_master_template_id.description: Numeric ID of the Stripo template Orbit uses as the skeleton when creating new emails. Find it in the URL when editing the template in Stripo: my.stripo.email/editor/v5/<projectId>/template/<thisId>. The template must contain a stripe block with the esd-email-gen-area attribute set on its td (Orbit_setup_stripo walks you through this). Required for the orbit_compose_stripo_email push step; not needed for the sync/list/document tools.

enable_telemetry.title: Anonymous usage telemetry
enable_telemetry.description: Sends only the skill / tool slug, MCPB version, and an opaque per-install ID. Never sends prompts, queries, tool arguments, or your IP. Helps us see which features matter so the next release improves the right things. Untick to opt out.

tools.name: orbit_list_skills
tools.description: List the Orbit skill library or filter it by category.

tools.name: orbit_route_task
tools.description: Route a user request to the best-fit Orbit protocol before answering, then ask any high-leverage missing user questions before taking action.

tools.name: orbit_load_skill
tools.description: Load an Orbit skill in summary or full mode.

tools.name: orbit_get_template
tools.description: Fetch a reusable Orbit template or output format.

tools.name: orbit_compose_sequence
tools.description: Suggest a multi-skill Orbit workflow for a goal.

tools.name: orbit_validate_output
tools.description: Run a structural validation pass on a draft against an Orbit skill.

tools.name: orbit_check_setup
tools.description: Run a healthcheck for Orbit config, brand-kit readiness, output paths, and Gemini image generation setup.

tools.name: orbit_bootstrap_home_workspace
tools.description: Create Orbit's default ~/Orbit working structure on first run and fill in any missing folders or starter files without overwriting existing user content.

tools.name: orbit_check_copy_readiness
tools.description: Use this before writing copy.

tools.name: orbit_validate_brand_kit
tools.description: Validate brand-profile.json, logo paths, example assets, and preferred layout settings.

tools.name: orbit_save_logo_file
tools.description: Copies an uploaded or temp-path logo file to the permanent brand kit logos directory.

tools.name: orbit_start_brand_guidelines_intake
tools.description: Required first step before creating brand guidelines or a brand kit.

tools.name: orbit_build_brand_kit_draft
tools.description: Create a reviewable brand-kit draft with brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, and a normalized asset plan.

tools.name: orbit_write_brand_kit
tools.description: Write an approved brand-kit draft to disk, including brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, and copied asset files.

tools.name: orbit_update_brand_guidelines
tools.description: Update draft or existing brand-guidelines.md content without requiring a full brand-kit re-intake.

tools.name: orbit_lifecycle_diagram
tools.description: Build, update, or render a lifecycle program flow diagram with nodes, edges, badges, and Mermaid output.

tools.name: orbit_brand_header
tools.description: Build, update, or render a brand-safe email header.

tools.name: orbit_start_program_discovery
tools.description: Required first step before creating any journey, program, or campaign.

tools.name: orbit_import_design
tools.description: Import an email design into Orbit as a structured design record.

tools.name: orbit_email_component_map
tools.description: Manage the email component map for an imported design.

tools.name: orbit_build_program_workspace
tools.description: Create a local Orbit workspace that ties together discovery, the brief, message plan, diagram, and downstream build artifacts.

tools.name: orbit_build_message_plan
tools.description: Create a channel-by-channel message inventory with CTAs, module needs, dependencies, and personalization requirements.

tools.name: orbit_build_email_template_spec
tools.description: Create a canonical Orbit email template spec before MJML generation.

tools.name: orbit_generate_mjml_template
tools.description: Generate canonical MJML from an approved Orbit email template spec.

tools.name: orbit_compile_email_template
tools.description: Compile Orbit MJML to HTML and plain text, with a compile report and optional files on disk.

tools.name: orbit_preview_email_template
tools.description: Create desktop, mobile, and dark-mode preview HTML for an Orbit email and surface them as Claude artifacts.

tools.name: orbit_validate_email_template
tools.description: Run Orbit email QA for structure, personalization fallbacks, links, legal blocks, contrast, and Braze-safe markup.

tools.name: orbit_generate_email_components
tools.description: Generate reusable MJML/HTML email components from an approved component map and save them into Orbit's local library.

tools.name: orbit_assemble_email_template_from_components
tools.description: Assemble a final MJML/HTML lifecycle email from approved reusable Orbit components that share compatible props-and-slots contracts.

tools.name: orbit_sync_to_braze
tools.description: Publish Orbit assets to Braze.

tools.name: orbit_upload_images_to_braze
tools.description: Upload email component images to Braze's media library and get back hosted CDN URLs.

tools.name: orbit_reconcile_image_urls
tools.description: Patch Braze-hosted CDN URLs into compiled email HTML files and the Stripo assembly template.

tools.name: orbit_build_braze_pack
tools.description: Package Orbit production artifacts into a Braze-ready implementation bundle.

tools.name: orbit_create_braze_canvas
tools.description: Create a Braze Canvas from an Orbit braze pack and message plan.

tools.name: orbit_audit_braze_instance
tools.description: Pull a complete inventory of all Canvases, campaigns, segments, content blocks,

tools.name: orbit_read_braze_canvas
tools.description: Read the full structure of an existing Braze Canvas — steps, channels, delays, entry audience, and schedule. Also reverse-maps it to an Orbit message plan so you can import existing Canvases into Orbit's program model.

tools.name: orbit_read_braze_campaign
tools.description: Read the full structure of an existing Braze Campaign — channels, messages, schedule, conversion behaviours, and tags.

tools.name: orbit_analyse_segments
tools.description: List all Braze segments with details, tags, and optional size trend data.

tools.name: orbit_audit_content_blocks
tools.description: Inventory all Braze Content Blocks with duplicate detection, stale block identification, and optional content analysis (Liquid fallback checks, broken images, HTTP URLs).

tools.name: orbit_validate_braze_data
tools.description: Check whether custom events and custom attributes referenced in an Orbit message

tools.name: orbit_check_deliverability
tools.description: Pull hard bounce and unsubscribe data from Braze for the specified period.

tools.name: orbit_validate_test_users
tools.description: Look up Braze user profiles by external ID or email to validate personalisation

tools.name: orbit_braze_performance
tools.description: Pull time-series performance data for Canvases, campaigns, and segments.

tools.name: orbit_check_template_collision
tools.description: Check whether an email template with a given name already exists in Braze before creating.

tools.name: orbit_list_braze_templates
tools.description: List all email templates in the Braze workspace with their IDs, names, and dates.

tools.name: orbit_fetch_braze_template
tools.description: Fetch the full HTML content of an existing Braze email template by ID or name.

tools.name: orbit_parse_master_template
tools.description: Parse an HTML email template into reusable sections/modules, extract content slots,

tools.name: orbit_generate_template_variations
tools.description: Generate N variation specs from a parsed master template.

tools.name: orbit_assemble_template_variation
tools.description: Assemble a populated variation spec into final HTML by replacing content slots

tools.name: orbit_upload_template_images
tools.description: Upload images to Braze's media library for use in email templates.

tools.name: orbit_braze_namer
tools.description: Generate a consistent naming convention string for a Braze asset.

tools.name: orbit_braze_namer_dimensions
tools.description: List all available dimensions and values for the Braze naming convention generator.

tools.name: orbit_export_notion_bundle
tools.description: Create a Notion-friendly Markdown bundle with program docs, artifact manifests, and preview references.

tools.name: orbit_library
tools.description: Save, list, load, or update items in Orbit's local library of templates, components, modules, and programs.

tools.name: orbit_score_subject_line
tools.description: Rate an email subject line and preheader for grammar, content-emptiness, spam signals, length, and inbox-preview flow. Returns a 0-100 score with a tier and specific issues.

tools.name: orbit_sample_size
tools.description: Calculate the sample size required per arm for a two-proportion A/B test. Returns per-arm size, total, expected rates, and test duration if daily volume is provided.

tools.name: orbit_test_significance
tools.description: Run a two-proportion z-test on A/B test results. Returns z-score, p-value, lift %, and whether the result is statistically significant.

tools.name: orbit_ltv_payback
tools.description: Calculate LTV, LTV:CAC ratio, and payback period from ARPU, gross margin, monthly churn, and CAC. Returns a tier (losing/thin/marginal/healthy/strong) and payback band.

tools.name: orbit_check_push_copy
tools.description: Check how a push notification renders on iOS, Android, and Web. Returns per-platform truncation warnings and the truncated preview.

tools.name: orbit_check_email_size
tools.description: Check whether an email will be clipped by Gmail's 102 KB threshold. Accepts raw HTML or byte count. Returns size, % of limit, tier, and recommendation.

tools.name: orbit_liquid_snippet
tools.description: Generate a Braze Liquid snippet for personalised date / text / control-flow rendering. Supports common date formats, text filters, and if/else fallback blocks.

tools.name: orbit_check_version
tools.description: Compare your installed Orbit version against the latest release on GitHub. Returns up_to_date, update_available, or ahead with a download link when an update is available.

tools.name: orbit_setup_stripo
tools.description: Connect Stripo to Orbit. Reports which Stripo credentials are present (Plugin ID + Secret Key, REST API token, Master Template ID), runs live probes against Stripo's APIs, and returns a step-by-step markdown checklist. Run this first before any other Stripo API integration tool.

tools.name: orbit_sync_stripo_modules
tools.description: Pull all custom saved modules from the user's Stripo workspace via the REST API into Orbit's local library. Classifies via Stripo's own category taxonomy (header / hero / content / footer). Stale modules are tagged archived, never hard-deleted. Re-run any time saved modules change in Stripo.

tools.name: orbit_list_stripo_modules
tools.description: Read Stripo modules from Orbit's local library (no API call). Filter by classification or free-text search. Use this before composing an email to see what's available. Pass include_html for file paths the composer needs. The per-item archived flag is tag-derived and unreliable — use include_html:true + non-null artifact_path as the live-module signal.

tools.name: orbit_document_stripo_design_system
tools.description: Generate a markdown design-system brief from synced Stripo modules: inventory, detected brand tokens, inferred composition rules, risks. Saves to <workspace>/outputs/stripo-design-system/. Run after sync and before composing — this is the canonical reference for on-brand decisions.

tools.name: orbit_compose_stripo_email
tools.description: Compose an email from a sequence of synced Stripo modules. Validates exactly one header + one footer. Stitches modules into a full HTML email document with CSS deduped and esd-custom-block-id preserved. Returns assembled HTML with a directive for Claude to render an HTML artifact preview immediately. Use push: true to send to Stripo (requires master template configured first).

tools.name: orbit_audit_stripo_modules
tools.description: Audit synced Stripo modules for structural issues — orphaned floats (the lopsided-block bug), STRIPE-with-columns anti-pattern, sub-600 widths, missing alt text, footer compliance gaps, optionally broken image URLs. Generates a markdown audit doc at ~/Orbit/outputs/stripo-audit/. Run after sync. Auto-fixable findings can be patched via orbit_fix_stripo_module.

tools.name: orbit_fix_stripo_module
tools.description: Returns corrected HTML for a Stripo module + paste-back instructions. Auto-fixes available for orphaned_float and sub_600_width. Manual paste required because Stripo's REST API is read-only for modules. Run orbit_audit_stripo_modules first to find what needs fixing.

tools.name: orbit_learn_email_template
tools.description: Parse an HTML email template (Stripo-aware) into modules + brand tokens and save to Orbit's library so future conversations can reference it. Use this the first time a user pastes an email template.

tools.name: orbit_build_email_from_template
tools.description: Compose an on-brand email from a previously-learned template's modules. Output is Stripo-pasteable with es-* / esd-* structure intact.

tools.name: orbit_modify_email_template
tools.description: Apply structured edits (remove module, change CTA/heading text, swap image) to an assembled email referencing a learned template's module catalog.

tools.name: orbit_check_email_auth
tools.description: Resolve DNS records for a domain and verify SPF, DMARC, and DKIM (common selectors + any you supply). Returns pass/warn/fail with specific remediation strings.

tools.name: orbit_check_bimi
tools.description: Validate a domain's BIMI record — SVG logo URL, VMC certificate, and DMARC-policy prerequisite check.

tools.name: orbit_dark_mode_check
tools.description: Scan an HTML email for colour pairs that invert into invisible or low-contrast text in Apple Mail / Outlook dark mode.

tools.name: orbit_accessibility_lint
tools.description: WCAG AA lint on email HTML — alt-text coverage, contrast ratios, semantic heading order, link-text quality, html lang, layout-table role=presentation.

tools.name: orbit_rfm_score
tools.description: Score a customer list on RFM quintiles and classify each user into a named segment (Champions, Loyal, At Risk, Hibernating, …) with per-segment revenue share and recommended actions.

tools.name: orbit_cohort_retention
tools.description: Build retention curves from enrollment + revenue-event data. Returns per-cohort period-over-period retention% plus an aggregate curve.

tools.name: orbit_score_preheader
tools.description: Score an email preheader: client-by-client inbox-preview clipping, duplicate-subject risk, greeking, placeholder leakage.

tools.name: orbit_audit_unsubscribe_page
tools.description: Fetch and lint an unsubscribe URL for one-click compliance, password-gate, preference-centre granularity, and Gmail / Yahoo 2024 bulk-sender rules.

tools.name: orbit_validate_liquid
tools.description: Syntax + fallback check on Braze Liquid — tag balance, default-filter coverage, unknown-attribute detection against a supplied inventory.

tools.name: orbit_compose_sms
tools.description: SMS composer — detect GSM-7 vs UCS-2 encoding, count segments, inject regional compliance footer (US CTIA, AU, UK/EU GDPR, CA CASL).

tools.name: orbit_free_shipping_threshold
tools.description: Free-shipping threshold calculator. Given AOV, margin, and shipping cost, returns conservative/standard/aggressive thresholds with net-contribution math.

tools.name: orbit_replenishment_calc
tools.description: Given pack size and daily consumption, compute the 3-touch replenishment email schedule (early nudge, reminder, last-chance).

tools.name: orbit_build_exec_report
tools.description: Turn raw channel stats into a Notion-ready exec-summary markdown with headline numbers, per-channel table, and narrative. Supports multi-currency via currency_code.

tools.name: orbit_qa_email
tools.description: One-shot pre-send email QA gate — runs accessibility, dark-mode, and Gmail-clipping checks in a single call and returns a combined pass/warn/fail verdict.

tools.name: orbit_render_email_preview
tools.description: Produce desktop, mobile, and dark-mode preview HTML artifacts from arbitrary email HTML.

tools.name: orbit_parse_postmaster_signal
tools.description: Interpret Gmail Postmaster Tools data (CSV export or snapshot) with Gmail-threshold context and recommended actions per metric.

tools.name: orbit_list_growth_forecast
tools.description: Project 12-month subscriber list trajectory from current size, acquisition, and churn. Returns trajectory table plus break-even / halving milestones.

tools.name: orbit_gdpr_consent_audit
tools.description: Scan signup-page / email-footer / preference-centre HTML for GDPR consent signals — pre-ticked checkboxes, sender identifiability, purpose specificity, right to withdraw, privacy link.

tools.name: orbit_parse_test_readout
tools.description: Turn A/B test counts into a written read-out with significance, 95% CI on rate difference, verdict (winner/loser/inconclusive), and ship-or-not recommendation.

tools.name: orbit_get_stripo_email
tools.description: Fetch a single generated email from your Stripo workspace by numeric ID (GET /emails/<id>). Recovers the rendered copy/structure of an email pushed earlier — useful because slot_values are baked in server-side at push time and don't appear in local compose previews. Read-only.

tools.name: orbit_delete_stripo_email
tools.description: Delete one or more generated emails from your Stripo workspace by numeric ID (DELETE /emails/<id> each). Accepts a single ID or an array; only the explicit IDs given are deleted (no delete-all). Returns a per-ID deleted/failed breakdown. Master templates are protected by the write-guard and cannot be touched.

tools.name: orbit_check_stripo_auth
tools.description: Live-probe Stripo credentials before relying on them. Reports whether the REST token and Plugin credentials are configured and actively validates the REST token with a read-only GET, so an expired or revoked token (the 401 that blocks pushes) is caught proactively instead of mid-push.

tools.name: orbit_list_stripo_emails
tools.description: List generated emails in your Stripo workspace (GET /emails) — paginated, searchable, sortable; returns id/name/folder_id/timestamps/editor_url/preview_url per email. folder_id filtering is RECURSIVE (includes subfolders). Read-only; max 100 per page.

tools.name: orbit_list_stripo_folders
tools.description: Fetch the full recursive folder tree of your Stripo workspace (GET /folders/EMAIL or TEMPLATE). Read-only discovery — Stripo has NO folder write/move API; use the IDs for email-list filters and as destinations for the cabinet-UI move recipe.

tools.name: orbit_list_stripo_templates
tools.description: List templates in your Stripo workspace (GET /templates) with IDs, names, editor/preview URLs. Auto-discovers the master template ID (is_configured_master flags the one Orbit pushes into). Read-only.

tools.name: orbit_import_stripo_template
tools.description: Create a NEW Stripo template from an MJML document (POST /templates/import/mjml — Stripo's only API door into template creation). Reads the template back after import and checks the esd-email-gen-area marker + zero-padding rule; returns template_id, editor_url, preview_url + verification report (never compiled HTML). NOTE: mj-raw content is DROPPED by Stripo's compiler, so the gen-area marker always needs one manual editor step (the response's next_step explains it). Existing templates stay API-read-only. Counts 1 against the email_and_template quota.

tools.name: orbit_export_stripo_email_html
tools.description: Export one generated Stripo email as compiled, CSS-inlined, send-ready HTML to a local file (returns path + byte count, never raw HTML). METERED against the org's export quota (~300/period) — check orbit_get_stripo_limits first and never loop it. Emails only (template export strips the gen-area marker).

tools.name: orbit_get_stripo_limits
tools.description: Read Stripo org quota counters: email_and_template (stored emails+templates vs plan cap — pushes fail at the cap), export (metered HTML-export quota), timer. Surfaces count/limit/remaining + warnings at 85% pressure. Check before push batches or exports.

tools.name: orbit_esp_capabilities
tools.description: Return the honest capability matrix for one ESP or all of them — what each platform supports natively, what is partial (with the named constraint), and what its public API cannot do. Includes the reason and nearest alternative for every unsupported operation.

tools.name: orbit_check_esp_auth
tools.description: Probe the configured credentials for an ESP (defaults to your ORBIT_DEFAULT_PLATFORM, or braze) and report ok, auth_failed, or needs_setup. Returns the exact setup message naming which fields are missing and where to find them.

tools.name: orbit_esp_templates
tools.description: Read email templates from any supported ESP in a normalized shape (list or get a single template with HTML). Pass platform to target a specific ESP, or rely on the default-platform fallback.

tools.name: orbit_esp_push_template
tools.description: Create or update an email template on a supported ESP (write path, kept separate from reads so approving a read never silently approves a write). Returns whether the template was created or updated, its id, and a link; returns an unsupported response where the ESP has no template CRUD (Customer.io).

tools.name: orbit_esp_read
tools.description: Read campaigns and flows, segments and lists, or performance metrics from any supported ESP, normalized with the untranslated payload attached. Stats an ESP cannot provide are left null and listed as unavailable, never zero-filled.

tools.name: orbit_esp_send_test
tools.description: Send a proof email through an ESP that supports test sends, to a named recipient. Returns an unsupported response with the nearest alternative where the ESP has no test-send endpoint (Klaviyo — use render plus Orbit's local QA gate).

tools.name: orbit_bootstrap_brain
tools.description: Scaffold a ready template-brain repo at a given path — README with the four operating rules, CONVENTIONS, stage program folders, knowledge stubs, and a graphify-out gitignore — worded for the user's named company and ESP. Refuses to overwrite a non-empty directory.

tools.name: orbit_scaffold_brain_program
tools.description: Create one program folder under a stage with a fully-framed prd.md stub (status backlog, human_approved false so AI drafts never build unreviewed) plus pre-cross-linked copy, email-build, and technical spec siblings. The stub is what makes the program exist to any agent reading the brain.

tools.name: orbit_init_verified_claims
tools.description: Generate a verified-claims file with the staleness rule, the receipt table (claim, raw value, safe rounded-down display, source query, date read), and the hard gate that any figure in a proof module must trace to a receipt. Also writes a check-claims script that fails a build on figures absent from the claims file.

tools.name: orbit_generate_brain_gate
tools.description: Generate a build gate script parameterised to the user's limits and templating branches — compile, resolve every branch off one variable map, byte-based clip check, mobile overflow, orphan and CTA-parity checks, axe-core, and master-module drift. States its honest scope: a layout and structure gate only; render and inbox truth stay with Orbit's render gate.
